summary: Iteration 12 - Visual consistency testing of Premium Obsidian Black Card theme. All tests PASSED. Premium version correctly uses gold palette (#d4af37, #e8d48b, #b8960f, #c5a028) on black background (#080808). Free version correctly uses navy blue (#0f172a) without premium features.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified Obsidian Black Card theme visual consistency. All premium screens use gold palette (#d4af37, #e8d48b, #b8960f, #c5a028) on black background (#080808). No blue (#3b82f6), green (#22c55e), or amber (#f59e0b) colors found in premium views. Free version correctly shows navy blue background without premium badge.

free_version.details: No premium-active class, no PREMIUM badge, navy blue background rgb(15, 23, 42)

premium_main_screen.details: premium-active class applied, PREMIUM badge with gold gradient (rgb(212, 175, 55) to rgb(184, 150, 15)), Obsidian Black background rgb(8, 8, 8)

premium_action_buttons.details: Foto button: gold gradient background, Gallery button: gold text (#e8d48b), Limpar button: gold text (#d4af37)

premium_dieta_tabs.details: Hoje/Semana/Perfil/Dashboard tabs all use gold colors - active tab has gold gradient, inactive tabs have gold text

premium_calorie_ring.details: Ring stroke color is gold rgb(212, 175, 55)

premium_dashboard.details: Black background rgb(8, 8, 8), gold periodo selector, gold active tabs, gold card borders rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.08)

premium_profile_edit_button.details: Edit Profile button uses gold gradient (not amber) - background linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(212, 175, 55), rgb(184, 150, 15))
